title: AureusMC Cobblemon
description: AureusMC Cobblemon, one of the most fun server experiences you will ever have with Cobblemon utilising all the best features from your childhood!
body:
AureusMC is a Cobblemon modpack showcasing the very best of pokemon in minecraft. This modpack has several features including the base cobblemon and direct access to our server with all the best features!

Be the very best and soar back to your childhood with this modpack as you play featurs from games new and old. Become a trainer, breeder or explorer as you travel the world and build your town team for your own adventure.
